topic.title: Front pillar trim
topic.ptxt: Remove front pillar trim (1) pulling it in arrow direction.

topic.title: Dash side trim and front side sill scuff
topic.ptxt: Remove front side sill scuff (1) and then remove dash side trim (2) pulling them in arrow directions.

topic.title: Rear side sill scuff
topic.ptxt: Remove rear side sill scuff (1) pulling it in arrow direction.

s1.ptxt: Remove front and rear side sill scuffs (4).
Remove center pillar lower trim (1) pulling it in arrow direction.
Remove front seat belt anchor plate bolt (3).
Remove upper trim (2) pulling them in arrow directions.

topic.title: Tail end trim
topic.ptxt: Remove clips and then remove tail end trim (1) pulling it in arrow direction.

s1.ptxt: Remove rear side sill scuff (1) and tail end trim (2).
Remove clips and then remove rear quarter inner lower trim (3) pulling it in arrow direction.
Remove rear quarter inner upper trim (4) pulling it in arrow direction.

servinfosub.title: Installation

attention2.ptxt: When installing front pillar trim, use care to avoid that the claws of front pillar trim are stuck in the curtain air bag (inflator) module or its harness.

servinfosub.ptxt: Reverse removal procedure noting the following points.

item.ptxt: Tighten front seat belt anchor plate bolt to specified torque.
Tighten rear seat hinge bolts to specified torque.
